recommendations.title: Future World
recommendations.overview: A young boy searches a future world wasteland for a rumored cure for his dying mother.

recommendations.overview: In 19th century Baltimore, Isabel Porter, a girl stricken with grief from her parents' untimely death, voluntarily checks herself into the Rosewood Institute. Subjected to bizarre and increasingly violent pseudo-scientific experiments in personality

recommendations.title: Mulholland Drive

recommendations.title: Marina Abramović: The Artist Is Present
recommendations.overview: Performance artist Marina Abramovic prepares for a major retrospective of her work at the Museum of Modern Art in New York.

recommendations.title: Woman in Love
recommendations.overview: An actor's career takes a "Tootsie"-like turn when he lets himself be cast as a woman in a movie.

recommendations.title: This Is the End
recommendations.overview: While attending a party at James Franco's house, Seth Rogen, Jay Baruchel and many other celebrities are faced with the apocalypse.

recommendations.title: You're Killing Me Susana
recommendations.overview: An actor's world comes crashing down after he learns that his wife has left him.

recommendations.title: Pineapple Express
recommendations.overview: A stoner and his dealer are forced to go on the run from the police after the pothead witnesses a cop commit a murder.
